revision.comment: Adding [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia0]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia0]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Adding [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia]] to [[Category:qq]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}}][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Moving from [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 1 6 4]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 1]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 1]] to [[Category:qq-{{subst:NAMESPACE}}-qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 1]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 1]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove deleted category Pages and Categories from Wikipedia
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q110415926)
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23582763848|commit triggered pipeline]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24296132115|time triggered pipeline]]
Bot: consolidate 5 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template (has duplicate-language pairs) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24975162458|time triggered pipeline]]
